name: gemini-coder-toolkit
description: A collection of task-automation skills explicitly formatted and packaged for compatibility with the Gemini CLI environment.
author: Gemini CLI Users

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && for d in skills/*; do if [ -d "$d" ]; then skill_name=$(basename "$d"); echo "Packaging ${skill_name}..."; (cd "$d" && zip -rq "../../dist/${skill_name}.skill" .); fi; done
